messages.content:
Question: What has been the most frequent problem AI Cirku-Tech encountered over the past five months? The associated product Id is 01tWt000006hV8LIAU. Return only the issue Id of the most reported issue for this product.

- Today's date: 2023-01-16

Available databases: core_crm, sales_pipeline, activities, products_Orders, territory, support_tickets, email_database, knowledge_base

Available schema:
Database: core_crm (sqlite)
  Table: User — Id, FirstName, LastName, Email, Phone, Username, Alias, LanguageLocaleKey, EmailEncodingKey, TimeZoneSidKey, LocaleSidKey
  Table: Account — Id, Name, Phone, Industry, Description, NumberOfEmployees, ShippingState
  Table: Contact — Id, FirstName, LastName, Email, AccountId
Database: sales_pipeline (duckdb)
  Table: Contract — Id, AccountId, Status, StartDate, CustomerSignedDate, CompanySignedDate, Description, ContractTerm
  Table: Lead — Id, FirstName, LastName, Email, Phone, Company, Status, ConvertedContactId, ConvertedAccountId, Title, CreatedDate, ConvertedDate, IsConverted, OwnerId
  Table: Opportunity — Id, ContractID__c, AccountId, ContactId, OwnerId, Probability, Amount, StageName, Name, Description, CreatedDate, CloseDate
  Table: OpportunityLineItem — Id, OpportunityId, Product2Id, PricebookEntryId, Quantity, TotalPrice
  Table: Quote — Id, OpportunityId, AccountId, ContactId, Name, Description, Status, CreatedDate, ExpirationDate
  Table: QuoteLineItem — Id, QuoteId, OpportunityLineItemId, Product2Id, PricebookEntryId, Quantity, UnitPrice, Discount, TotalPrice
Database: activities (duckdb)
  Table: Event — Id, WhatId, OwnerId, StartDateTime, Subject, Description, DurationInMinutes, Location, IsAllDayEvent
  Table: Task — Id, WhatId, OwnerId, Priority, Status, ActivityDate, Subject, Description
  Table: VoiceCallTranscript__c — Id, OpportunityId__c, LeadId__c, Body__c, CreatedDate, EndTime__c
Database: products_Orders (sqlite)
  Table: ProductCategory — Id, Name, CatalogId
  Table: Product2 — Id, Name, Description, IsActive, External_ID__c
  Table: ProductCategoryProduct — Id, ProductCategoryId, ProductId
  Table: Pricebook2 — Id, Name, Description, IsActive, ValidFrom, ValidTo
  Table: PricebookEntry — Id, Pricebook2Id, Product2Id, UnitPrice
  Table: Order — (no columns)
  Table: OrderItem — Id, OrderId, Product2Id, Quantity, UnitPrice, PriceBookEntryId
Database: territory (sqlite)
  Table: Territory2 — Id, Name, Description
  Table: UserTerritory2Association — Id, UserId, Territory2Id
Database: support_tickets (postgres)
  Table: Case — id, priority, subject, description, status, contactid, createddate, closeddate, orderitemid__c, issueid__c, accountid, ownerid
  Table: casehistory__c — id, caseid__c, oldvalue__c, newvalue__c, createddate, field__c
  Table: emailmessage — id, subject, textbody, parentid, fromaddress, toids, messagedate, relatedtoid
  Table: issue__c — id, name, description__c
  Table: knowledge__kav — id, title, faq_answer__c, summary, urlname
  Table: livechattranscript — id, caseid, accountid, ownerid, body, endtime, livechatvisitorid, contactid
Database: email_database (postgres)
  Table: Case — id, priority, subject, description, status, contactid, createddate, closeddate, orderitemid__c, issueid__c, accountid, ownerid
  Table: casehistory__c — id, caseid__c, oldvalue__c, newvalue__c, createddate, field__c
  Table: emailmessage — id, subject, textbody, parentid, fromaddress, toids, messagedate, relatedtoid
  Table: issue__c — id, name, description__c
  Table: knowledge__kav — id, title, faq_answer__c, summary, urlname
  Table: livechattranscript — id, caseid, accountid, ownerid, body, endtime, livechatvisitorid, contactid
Database: knowledge_base (postgres)
  Table: Case — id, priority, subject, description, status, contactid, createddate, closeddate, orderitemid__c, issueid__c, accountid, ownerid
  Table: casehistory__c — id, caseid__c, oldvalue__c, newvalue__c, createddate, field__c
  Table: emailmessage — id, subject, textbody, parentid, fromaddress, toids, messagedate, relatedtoid
  Table: issue__c — id, name, description__c
  Table: knowledge__kav — id, title, faq_answer__c, summary, urlname
  Table: livechattranscript — id, caseid, accountid, ownerid, body, endtime, livechatvisitorid, contactid

function.name: query_db
function.arguments: {"query_type": "sql", "query": "SELECT Id, Name FROM Account WHERE Name LIKE '%AI Cirku-Tech%'", "database": "core_crm"}

function.name: query_db
function.arguments: {"query_type": "sql", "database": "products_Orders", "query": "SELECT Id, Product2Id FROM OrderItem WHERE TRIM(REPLACE(Product2Id, '#', '')) = '01tWt000006hV8LIAU'"}

function.name: execute_python
function.arguments:
{"code": "import pandas as pd

# Load data
order_items = pd.DataFrame(env['data_2'])
cases = pd.DataFrame(env['data_4'])

# Clean IDs
order_items['Id'] = order_items['Id'].str.replace('#', '').str.strip()
cases['orderitemid__c'] = cases['orderitemid__c'].str.replace('#', '').str.strip()

# Merge
merged = pd.merge(cases, order_items, left_on='orderitemid__c', right_on='Id', how='inner')

# Filter by date (past 5 months from 2023-01-16 -> 2022-08-16 to 2023-01-16)
merged['createddate'] = pd.to_datetime(merged['createddate'])
filtered = merged[(merged['createddate'] >= '2022-08-16') & (merged['createddate'] <= '2023-01-16')]

# Find most frequent issue
issue_counts = filtered['issueid__c'].value_counts()
print(issue_counts)
"}

- Today's date: 2023-01-16
